{"id":"project-LICHEN-pis9","title":"Unbounded growth of packet_hashes_sent set","description":"## Location
python/src/lichen/sim/metrics.py:37

## Description
The packet_hashes_sent set grows without bound as record_tx() is called. Each unique packet hash is stored forever. In long-running simulations with many unique packets, this accumulates memory indefinitely with no upper limit or eviction mechanism.

## Failure Scenario
A 24-hour stress test simulation generates 10 million unique packets. Each 16-char hash string consumes ~80 bytes in Python. The set accumulates ~800MB+ for hashes alone, eventually causing MemoryError or severe slowdown.

## Category

new_value: Hashes already bounded; errors fix in same file covers unbounded growth.
